text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: MMLEADS │ August 2021 │ V 1.0 85 

MDCR_HOP_TOTAL_FFS_USE 

LABEL: Medicare Use (FFS Claim Count) — Hospital Outpatient 

DESCRIPTION: This variable is the total count of Medicare Hospital Outpatient (HOP) claims for the beneficiary during 
the year. 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: Medicare Hospital Outpatient Claims file (derived) 

VALUES: XX 

COMMENT: The corresponding Medicare payment information for HOP is in the MDCR_HOP_TOTAL_FFS_SPEND
